config.css: * { box-sizing: border-box; font-family: system-ui; } .grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } } .controls { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; } .row { display: flex; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; } label { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; flex: 1; min-width: 180px; } select, input[type=range] { width: 100%; padding: 6px; } button { padding: 10px 24px; background: #2563eb; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; } button.running { background: #dc2626; } .chart-panel { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; } .chart-panel h3 { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 14px; } .live-values { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px; } .card { flex: 1; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px; text-align: center; } .card-label { font-size: 11px; color: #666; } .card-value { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; } .chart-area { height: 200px; background: #1e1e1e; border-radius: 6px; position: relative; } .log { margin-top: 16px; max-height: 150px; overflow-y: auto; font-family: monospace; font-size: 11px; background: #1e1e1e; color: #0f0; padding: 8px; border-radius: 6px; } #status { font-weight: 600; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 4px; } #counter { color: #666; font-size: 12px; }
